data.title: webhouse.app — AI-Native Content Engine
data.metaDescription: The CMS where you describe what you want and get a production-ready site. Schema-driven content. AI-powered authoring. Static-first output.

sections.label: Features
sections.title:
Everything the AI
shouldn't reinvent.
sections.description: Content modeling, persistence, media pipelines, AI orchestration, and static output — all in one embeddable TypeScript library.

items.title: AI Agent Orchestration
items.description: Provider-agnostic agents for content generation, rewriting, translation, SEO optimization, and design token generation. Swap between Anthropic, OpenAI, or local models.

items.title: Schema-Driven Content
items.description: JSON Schema powered collections and blocks. Every piece of content is typed, validated, and introspectable — so AI agents can reason about structure.

items.title: Static-First Output
items.description: The production artifact is always pre-rendered HTML + CSS + minimal JS. No runtime framework unless you opt in. Incremental builds with dependency tracking.

items.title: Framework Adapters
items.description: First-class integration with Next.js (App Router, Server Components, ISR), Astro (island architecture), and generic Node.js/Express.

items.title: Media Pipeline
items.description: Sharp-based image processing with AI generation (Flux, DALL-E), responsive variants, WebP/AVIF conversion, blur hashes, and auto alt-text generation.

items.title: AI Lock System
items.description: Field-level protection enforced at the engine level. AI agents can never unlock fields — only humans can. WriteContext actor threading through all CRUD operations.

sections.label: Architecture
sections.title: Composable by design.
sections.description: A pipeline of discrete stages. Each can be extended, replaced, or bypassed.

sections.label: Model Context Protocol
sections.title:
Every site speaks
to every AI.
sections.description: Two MCP servers. One public and read-only — bundled with every built site. One authenticated — for content production from Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client.

cards.title: cms-mcp-client
cards.description: Bundled with every site. Any AI agent can discover and query published content — no API keys, no documentation needed.
cards.tools:
get_site_summary
list_collection
search_content
get_page
get_schema
export_all

cards.title: cms-mcp-server
cards.description: Full content production from Claude iOS, Claude.ai, Cursor, or Claude Code. Create, edit, publish, generate with AI — all via MCP.
cards.tools:
create_document · update_document
publish · unpublish
generate_with_ai · rewrite_field
upload_media · generate_image
trigger_build · get_build_status

sections.label: Get Started
sections.title:
Describe what you want.
Get a production-ready site.
sections.subtitle: Then keep iterating with AI or by hand.
